questionText: In a triangle with sides $$a, b, c,$$ $${r_1} > {r_2} > {r_3}$$ (which are the ex-radii) then  :
subject: Mathematics
solution:
$${r_1} > {r_2} > {r_3}$$

$$ \Rightarrow {\Delta \over {s - a}} > {\Delta \over {s - b}} > {\Delta \over {s - c}};$$

$$ \Rightarrow s - a < s - b < s - c$$

$$ \Rightarrow - a < - b < - c$$

$$ \Rightarrow a > b > c$$
